title: 4 Tier Cupcake Stand Acrylic Square Tower Display with Blue LED String Light, Cake Holder Dessert Tree Tower for Birthday, Wedding, Graduation, Anniversary, Party Decoration, Dia 15/20/25/30cm
features: 👩‍👩‍👧‍👦 BUYER'S PERSPECTIVE - One cupcake stand with LED light and good price also, that is why we produce this 3mm thickness acrylic stand, these series cake stands had been certified from market.

🌞 LED STRING LIGHT - We drill holes near the middle cylinder, it ensure that the LED strip light can effectively pass through every corner of the cake stand, just prepare 3 batteries to use this light strip for a long time.

🍰 4 TIER CUPCAKE STAND - Square diameter 15/20/25/30cm of each tier and height 10cm between each tier, it can hold 32-42 cakes also, blue and vibrant led light strip shining for unique look and light up your party.

💖 HIGH QUALITY - For this 3mm thick acrylic material, we also polish the edges carefully, Each plate in the cupcake display has a double-sided protective film to prevent scratches during transport. Please remove the protective film before using.

🍩 EASY INSTALLATION - The tiered cupcake stand use sturdy columns and screws to connect the tiers for strength and stability. Easy to assemble and disassemble. Small footprint, large storage capacity. You can disassemble and save when not using.
description: Product Description Ulifeme cupcake stand illuminate your party. Tier: 3, 4 or 5. Shape: Round and Square. Light Colour: Warm Yellow and Blue. Remarks: Just ready 3pcs AA batteries for led string light. See More
